letterText:
Date: June 13, 2026

To,
The Authorized Officer / Customer Support Team,
State Bank of India

Subject: Notification of demise of account holder and request for account status verification (Acc No: 30219488310)

Dear Sir/Madam,

I am writing to formally notify you of the sad demise of my Father, Ramesh Kumar, who passed away on June 5, 2026. The deceased held a bank account under Account Number: 30219488310 with your institution.

I request you to temporarily freeze any debits from this account to prevent unauthorized transactions, verify the registered nominee status for this account, and guide me through the balance transfer / closure process.

The official Death Certificate (No: DC-Chandigarh/2026/89481) is ready for your verification. Please let me know the official forms and documents required to initiate the claim/transfer.

Thank you for your assistance during this difficult time.

Sincerely yours,

____________________________
Amit Kumar
Relationship: Father
Phone: +91 98765 43210
Email: demo@griefbridge.com
Address: House 102, Sector 15-A, Chandigarh

Date: June 13, 2026

To,
The Authorized Officer / Customer Support Team,
Life Insurance Corporation of India (LIC)

Subject: Demise notification and request for claim initiation for Policy No: LIC-883012

Dear Sir/Madam,

I am writing to notify you of the sad demise of my Father, Ramesh Kumar, who was the insured policyholder under Life Insurance Policy Number: LIC-883012. The deceased passed away on June 5, 2026.

As the nominee/beneficiary of this policy, I request you to register this claim and send me the necessary claim settlement forms and list of supporting documentation required.

Enclosed/available is the Death Certificate Registration No: DC-Chandigarh/2026/89481 for registration of this notice.

Thank you for your assistance during this difficult time.

Sincerely yours,

____________________________
Amit Kumar
Relationship: Father
Phone: +91 98765 43210
Email: demo@griefbridge.com
Address: House 102, Sector 15-A, Chandigarh

Date: June 13, 2026

To,
The Authorized Officer / Customer Support Team,
UIDAI Regional Office Chandigarh

Subject: Notification of demise and request for update/cancellation of Record: 4930-1829-3810

Dear Sir/Madam,

I am writing to notify your office of the demise of my Father, Ramesh Kumar, who passed away on June 5, 2026. The deceased held document/record number: 4930-1829-3810 under your registry.

I request your office to update the status of this record to reflect the demise, or cancel/deactivate the credential to prevent misuse, as required by law.

A copy of the Death Certificate (Certificate No: DC-Chandigarh/2026/89481) is provided for record verification.

Thank you for your assistance during this difficult time.

Sincerely yours,

____________________________
Amit Kumar
Relationship: Father
Phone: +91 98765 43210
Email: demo@griefbridge.com
Address: House 102, Sector 15-A, Chandigarh

Date: June 13, 2026

The Authorized Officer / Customer Support Team,

Date: June 13, 2026

To,
The Authorized Officer / Customer Support Team,
Netflix India

Subject: Demise notification and account closure request for account: ramesh.kumar1954@gmail.com

Dear Support Team,

I am writing to notify you of the demise of my Father, Ramesh Kumar, who passed away on June 5, 2026. The deceased held an account on your platform registered under the email address: ramesh.kumar1954@gmail.com.

As the family representative, I request you to deactivate, delete, or memorialize this account, and cancel any recurring subscriptions or payments associated with it.

Attached is the official Death Certificate (Certificate No: DC-Chandigarh/2026/89481) for verification of this request.

Thank you for your assistance during this difficult time.

Sincerely yours,

____________________________
Amit Kumar
Relationship: Father
Phone: +91 98765 43210
Email: demo@griefbridge.com
Address: House 102, Sector 15-A, Chandigarh

Date: June 13, 2026

To,
The Authorized Officer / Customer Support Team,
Electricity Department Chandigarh

Subject: Request for transfer / disconnection of Utility connection (No: ELEC-CHD-94921)

Dear Sir/Madam,

I am writing to notify you of the demise of my Father, Ramesh Kumar, who was the registered consumer for connection number ELEC-CHD-94921. The deceased passed away on June 5, 2026.

I request you to update your billing records and transfer this service connection to my name. I will clear any pending dues and complete the necessary transfer formalities.

The Death Certificate No: DC-Chandigarh/2026/89481 is attached for verification.

Thank you for your assistance during this difficult time.

Sincerely yours,

____________________________
Amit Kumar
Relationship: Father
Phone: +91 98765 43210
Email: demo@griefbridge.com
Address: House 102, Sector 15-A, Chandigarh

Date: June 13, 2026
